summary: ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE InteractiveModule Architecture Verification Complete. All 7 rebuilt pages (Nourishment, Crystals, Herbology, Aromatherapy, Elixirs, Acupressure, MealPlanning) tested and working. Each page shows: mastery progress bar (Novice X/Y explored), search bar, filter tabs, visual tiles with color identity, tap-to-expand with full details, DeepDive AI button, +5 XP rewards. Dark base background (#0a0a12) with readable text. All 10 Mixer tabs work. Teachings and Encyclopedia still work with expansion. 50+ routes load without crash.
critical_code_review_comments: InteractiveModule.js correctly implements: search, filter tabs, mastery progress bar, per-item visual tiles with color identity, in-place expansion, XP rewards, DeepDive AI button, NarrationPlayer
ExplorationReward.js provides XP feedback with auto-dismiss after 3 seconds
All 7 rebuilt pages use InteractiveModule component correctly
SceneEngine.js no longer renders static backdrop photos - pages use dark base (#0a0a12)
MealPlanning.js has unique structure with plan cards, meal expansion, and DeepDive on each meal
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all rebuilt pages work, all features functional)
